name: First Premier Bank
description_short: Full-service bank offering checking, savings, personal loans, mortgages, credit cards, and wealth management services for individuals and businesses.
description_long:
First PREMIER Bank is a traditional full-service bank that has established itself as a comprehensive financial institution serving personal and business banking needs. The bank operates a multi-service platform that caters to customers at various income and asset levels, from entry-level banking customers to high-net-worth individuals seeking private banking services.

The bank's core offerings span multiple categories: personal and business checking accounts, savings products and CDs, personal loans and lines of credit, mortgages including jumbo loans and construction financing, credit cards, brokerage and investment services, retirement planning, insurance products, and wealth management. Their digital banking infrastructure includes free online and mobile banking platforms with bill pay and mobile deposit capabilities, alongside 37,000+ surcharge-free ATM access nationwide. They also offer specialized programs including a Professionals & Physician Loan Program for high-income borrowers and jumbo mortgage specialization.

First PREMIER differentiates itself through tiered service levels—standard personal banking alongside premium offerings like Reward Checking (requiring $15,000 monthly deposit relationships), PREMIER Money Market accounts with rate benefits for higher balances, and comprehensive wealth management for private banking clients. Their mortgage services emphasize fast online processing and local decisioning, while their investment services include both self-directed brokerage and managed portfolio options. The bank positions itself to serve both conservative savers and sophisticated investors.

As a traditional bank, First PREMIER Bank is fundamentally a mainstream financial institution best suited for customers seeking established banking infrastructure, FDIC insurance protections, and integrated financial services under one roof. The primary caveat is that as a conventional bank, they may not be the optimal choice for customers specifically seeking subprime credit products, rapid small-dollar lending, or specialized credit-building solutions—though their standard product suite is comprehensive for general banking needs. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal Checking (FREE+ Checking and Reward Checking options)
Debit Cards with surcharge-free ATM access (37,000+ nationwide)
Free Online and Mobile Banking with Bill Pay and Mobile Deposit
Savings Accounts and Certificates of Deposit (CDs)
Kids Savings Accounts (PREMIER Kids Club for ages 12 and under)
Personal Loans (auto, home improvement, debt consolidation)
Personal and Home Equity Lines of Credit
Home Mortgages (purchase, refinance, jumbo, construction, professionals/physician loans)
Personal Trust Services and Estate Planning
pros: Offers 37,000+ surcharge-free ATM access nationwide, providing substantial ATM network coverage
FREE+ Checking account with no hidden fees, monthly maintenance fees, or minimum balance requirements
Free Online, Mobile Banking, Bill Pay, and Mobile Deposit services included standard
Tiered checking options including Reward Checking with CD rate benefits for $15,000+ monthly deposits
Comprehensive mortgage services including jumbo loans, construction loans, and specialized Professionals & Physician Loan Program
Multiple savings vehicles including Regular Savings, Money Market, CDs, and IRA options with FDIC insurance
Integrated wealth management, private banking, financial planning, and investment services for higher-net-worth clients
Mobile Wallet integration for faster checkout and payment flexibility
cons: No mention of competitive APR comparisons or rate transparency on loan products from the website
Wealth management and private banking services appear designed primarily for higher-net-worth individuals, limiting accessibility
Limited information provided about credit card offerings or specific credit card products despite mention in header
No mention of business account features or commercial lending details despite 'Business Banking' in branding
No transparent fee schedule visible for mortgage origination, overdraft protection, or specialty services

contact.address: 500 S Minnesota Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57104

best_for: Customers seeking comprehensive banking services including checking, savings, lending, and investments in one institution
Homebuyers interested in mortgage products including jumbo loans, construction financing, or professional/physician loan programs
High-net-worth individuals and professionals seeking integrated wealth management, private banking, and estate planning
Savers looking for tiered product options (standard to premium) with FDIC-insured accounts and competitive CD rates
diagnosis: First PREMIER Bank is best for individuals and families seeking a traditional full-service banking relationship with FDIC-insured products, comprehensive lending options, and integrated investment services. The main caveat is that they function as a mainstream bank rather than a specialized subprime, credit-building, or alternative lender—so customers with damaged credit or seeking rapid small-dollar loans should look elsewhere.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 500 S Minnesota Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
